title: aeollanthus subacaulis var. linearis
intro:
Aeollanthus subacaulis var. linearis, also known as a type of Aeollanthus plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. 
This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial activities. 
The health benefits associated with Aeollanthus subacaulis var. linearis include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. 
Aeollanthus subacaulis var. linearis is typically prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are then used to treat various health conditions.
